crate-html v0 alive

If you are reading this, the daemon is running, your HTML was tarred up, streamed to PUT /api/sites/welcome, and is now being served back out of $XDG_DATA_HOME/crate/sites/welcome/.

Try it

crate push ./some-dir my-site
crate ls
crate open my-site

Where things live

  • Config: ~/.config/crate/config.yaml
  • Sites: ~/.local/share/crate/sites/
  • Daemon: http://localhost:7777 (bound to 127.0.0.1)
crate-html — local HTML hosting for AI coding agents.
